text.message: Why I was the rob dear sir?
didnt think ud trade since u just 4:1ed for it
Might be a dead player I fear
Little late in the game to be extorting if you ask me
u told me to ask last time
I see it as extremely unwise
As I can't get army or road
Could consider playing to get pacing on orange
Red if you give sheep trades I can trade wood
Man it's 9 brick all day there though
I know but u r too far ahead
Giving blue army might be mistake orange
Leaving blue alone is a strange one
Blue I really think giving me bricks would have helped
Helped you have a better chance to win, I mean
